runTitle: Vercel Production Smoke - Post Workflow Push Verification

expertAssessments.rationale: Production smoke on the latest deployed SHA covered the core guest-facing routes and baseline API responses without regression.
Deployment reached READY on the target SHA, but fresh usage evidence could not be collected through the local CLI.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Confirm billed usage in the Vercel dashboard or restore CLI usage access before the next release-facing QA run.

expertAssessments.rationale: The production smoke spec passed on the latest deployed commit after the workflow hardening changes.

usageChecks.summary: Local Vercel CLI usage lookup still failed in this environment during the post-push production smoke recheck.

completedImprovements.title: 랜딩 페이지 렌더링
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright smoke.spec on production: latest deployed SHA rendered / successfully.

completedImprovements.title: Health API 200 healthy
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright smoke.spec on production: /api/health responded successfully on latest deployed SHA.

completedImprovements.title: Production smoke console 401 resource noise 정리
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright smoke.spec console gate passed again on the latest deployed SHA after workflow follow-up push.

notes: Smoke command: PLAYWRIGHT_VERCEL_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts --grep-invert '@external' --config playwright.config.vercel.ts
Covered surfaces: /, /login, 404, /api/health, server API, /api/version, static assets, production console cleanliness
